note: Official HKBU 2025-2026 Handbook Programme and concentration tables are used; the 2026-2027 Handbook endpoint was not available for verification. Each of the seven catalogue Major identities is isolated and shared codes are repeated only across those identities. Science Common Core is 15 units: SCIE1006 and SCIE1007 plus three of the five displayed science introductory courses. Applied Biology contains Biotechnology and Environmental Science concentration paths; its separate double-degree catalogue identity is limited to the HKBU-published Environmental Science pathway. HKBU describes that option as three years at HKBU plus Year 4 Ecology and Conservation at the University of Lincoln, but does not publish Lincoln Year 4 course codes in this Handbook, so none are invented. Biochemical and Testing Sciences retains both Biomedical Chemistry and Testing and Certification paths. Computer Science retains four single concentrations and the three officially listed DMC double concentrations; department-approved open-pool courses not named in the Handbook are not fabricated, and recommendation-only Free Elective lists are excluded. The DMC single-concentration table states 6 elective units while its later free-elective note refers to a 3-unit requirement; the table value is retained and the conflict remains unresolved. Mathematics and Statistics includes the optional Applied Statistics and Data Science concentration lists; the main-table footnote requiring all 12 Major Elective units from Group B is retained. GEST4035 has no unit value in the Programme table; its linked official 2025-2026 course page confirms 3 units. University Language, General Education and uncoded Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned.
